title: SciSparc Stock Shoots Up Over 89% After Hours: What's Going On?
author: Mohd Haider
description: SciSparc's stock surged 89.13% after hours following a court-granted stay in its merger proceedings with AutoMax Motors until September 30, amid ongoing challenges in completing the merger agreement.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock experienced significant after-hours price increase, but has overall declined 75.66% in 2025 and remains down 71.87% over the past year

title: Global Telco Market in 2024: Revenue, Capex, and Profitability Insights for Leading Operators
author: Na
description: This report provides an in-depth analysis of the global telecommunications network operator (TNO) market, tracking key financial metrics for 140 telcos worldwide from 1Q11 through 3Q24. It covers industry revenues, capital expenditures, labor costs, and profitability trends, offering insights into market performance, regional dynamics, and operator rankings.

title: Historic API venture announces CEO
author: Prnewswire
description: Telecom operators and Ericsson have launched a new venture called Aduna, dedicated to accelerating the global adoption and innovation of common network APIs. Anthony Bartolo has been appointed as the CEO of Aduna.

title: Telecommunications Network Operators Market Review 2Q 2024 - Telcos Represented $1.77 Trillion in Revenues (0.1% growth YoY), $262.9 Billion in Labor Costs (2.1% YoY) and $300.7B in Capex (-6.9% YoY)
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The telecommunications network operator (telco) market saw mixed performance in 2Q 2024, with revenues up 0.1% year-over-year to $1.77 trillion, but capex declining 6.9% to $300.7 billion. Labor costs increased 2.1% to $262.9 billion, despite a 1.2% drop in headcount to 4.48 million employees.
